rationale: Re-verified round-5 (testing + ADR). (1) All three new tests are named against real seams: TestPanelRefuted_CrossRun_UnionReconcilesAll (7B.vb — run1 marker X@1 + failed panel_refuted, run2 round-2 re-panel unions (X,1)+(B,2), discharges X + satisfies B, no clobber); TestPanelRefuted_CrossRun_WarnPathDoesNotDischarge (7B.va — table over abandoned/missing-ref/transient, tally still shows X@1 RC → no false discharge, Refuses); TestPanelRefuted_HatchStillReconcilesPendingObligation (7B.xii — table over env-skip/config-disabled/abandoned + read-error-refuse + pristine control). All prior durable-audit tests retained (Marker/Satisfy/PanelRemoved/NaturalResolution/GetMetadataError/Pristine/AuditSurvives/Recovery/asymmetry). Seams (completeGetMetadataFn=bead.GetMetadata added parallel to completeMergeMetadataFn, closeBeadFn, readStubMergeExecutor.completeCalled) are real. (2) AC11(a-h) each map to a named test (provenance row 1142 enumerates them); the updated invariant (audited/verified-discharged across all retries AND paths incl hatches) is coherent+falsifiable — hatch-except-the-gate-not-the-obligation is internally consistent (hatch adds no new AppliedRefutations so no new obligation, but reconciles a pre-existing one). (3) ADR-0037 §7/§8 amendment text updated for hatch reconciliation, otherwise-unchanged §8 posture re-affirmed; ADR has real §6/§7/§8 targets. mindspec validate spec passes.
findings: APPROVE — no blocking findings. Round-5 additions (union pending-set, verified-vote-state discharge, every-path-incl-hatch reconciliation, 3 new tests, updated invariant/AC11) are internally consistent, named against real seams, and the ADR §7/§8 hatch amendment is coherent.

Non-blocking (editorial): per plan step 4 (panel_advisory.go:169-179) the config-disabled hatch returns nil applied and does not evaluate facts, so its tally may be unavailable at reconcile — a config-disabled hatch over a naturally-resolved pending would REFUSE rather than discharge. This is the fail-closed/safe direction and TestPanelRefuted_HatchStillReconcilesPendingObligation explicitly accepts reconcile-OR-refuse, so the invariant holds; worth a one-line implementer note that discharge on the config-disabled hatch is best-effort-only.
Non-blocking: refutation_discharged still carries a synthetic fixed reason and no evidence (parity confirmed intentional for natural-resolution audits, unlike panel_refuted).
